title: RESTORE - 211info
text: SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Donations and volunteers welcome. 254 W Adams Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1621 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 549-1621 ReStore Intake (541) 549-1193 Volunteers Kristina [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Store: Walk in -Check website for information including acceptable donation items -Volunteering: Call or email FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Sisters, Sisters School District Services: Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
